purpose: Convert the owner stack into a power router: every org is a lane, every lane has an operating use, every next move has a stack source.

routing_matrix.route: INVOCORDER captures machine-action facts -> Verifrax types admissibility/replay/authority -> BOUNDARYCAM exposes public boundary inspection -> qxvi records org-level receipt
VATFix supplies commercial vertical structure -> Verifrax supplies admissibility perimeter -> INVOCORDER records actions -> qxvi publishes control receipt
qvra builds micro-runtime -> qxvo/qzro feed utility events -> aikido-bounty-lab attacks assumptions -> promotion only after tests and release
TRUTHFRAMER frames meaning -> Verifrax limits admissibility claims -> qxvi publishes public control boundary
kaaffilm/CINEMATICUM defines cinematic jurisdiction -> TRUTHFRAMER frames audience meaning -> Verifrax prevents overclaiming -> qxvi publishes canonicality decision
ANTIMATTERIUM packages extreme research narrative -> TRUTHFRAMER frames claims -> Verifrax limits evidence authority -> qxvi records public register

priority_execution_order.reason: turn machine-action recorder power into live public inspection power

priority_execution_order.move: wire Verifrax admissibility vocabulary into BOUNDARYCAM bundle verification
priority_execution_order.reason: stop overclaiming and make public evidence claims typed

priority_execution_order.move: use VATFix as the commercial packaging template
priority_execution_order.reason: turn abstract evidence-control into a sellable vertical workflow

priority_execution_order.move: use qvra as prototype staging before promotion
priority_execution_order.reason: keep experimental fragments away from the public control plane until validated
